LONDON - WE ARE SITE SPECIFIC. LCLO CAN'T PERFORM OUTSIDE OF LONDON, OTHERWISE IT'S NO LONGER THE (L)CLO.

___________________

COMMUNITY - OUR FOCUS IS ON HOW WE BUILD COMMUNITY AROUND AND IN RELATION TO TECHNOLOGY. HOW THAT COMMUNITY SITS IN THE WIDER CONTEXT OF ITS SETTING. HOW WE TAKE UP SPACE.

___________________

LAPTOP - REALLY, THIS IS A STAND-IN FOR UBIQUITOUS MULTI-PURPOSE TECHNOLOGIES, BUT IT ALSO REPRESENTS A MATERIAL CONNECTION. WE ARE INTERESTED IN THE LAPTOP HOLISTICALLY. ITS SOFTWARE BUT ALSO ITS HARDWARE. ITS OS BUT ALSO ITS SPEAKERS.

___________________

ORCHESTRA - PARTLY, ITS ALLUSIONS TO SOUND MAKING, BUT ALSO ITS RELATION TO THEATRICAL STAGING. WE TRY TO KEEP OFF THE STAGE, HOPING TO BLUR THE LINES BETWEEN PERFORMER AND PARTICIPANT. EVERYONE IS IN LCLO. NO-ONE IS IN LCLO.

___________________
